debug_info.goal:
R : Type u_1
S : Type u_2
inst✝² : CommRing R
inst✝¹ : CommRing S
T : Type u_3
inst✝ : CommRing T
g : S →+* T
f : R →+* S
⊢ ∀ (x y : R), g (f (x + y)) = g (f x) + g (f y)

failed_attempts:
intro x y
    simpa using g.map_add (f x) (f y)

intro x y
    simp [RingHom.map_add, g.map_add, f.map_add]

intro x y
    simp [RingHom.map_add]
    <;> simp_all [add_assoc]
    <;> ring

intro x y
    have h₁ : f (x + y) = f x + f y := f.map_add x y
    have h₂ : g (f (x + y)) = g (f x + f y) := by rw [h₁]
    have h₃ : g (f x + f y) = g (f x) + g (f y) := g.map_add (f x) (f y)
    calc
      g (f (x + y)) = g (f x + f y) := h₂
      _ = g (f x) + g (f y) := h₃

intro x y
    have h : g (f (x + y)) = g (f x) + g (f y) := by
      have h₁ : f (x + y) = f x + f y := by
        simp [RingHom.map_add]
      have h₂ : g (f (x + y)) = g (f x + f y) := by rw [h₁]
      have h₃ : g (f x + f y) = g (f x) + g (f y) := by
        simp [RingHom.map_add]
      calc
        g (f (x + y)) = g (f x + f y) := by rw [h₁]
        _ = g (f x) + g (f y) := by simp [RingHom.map_add]
    exact h

intro x y
    -- Use the fact that f is a ring homomorphism to preserve addition, then use the fact that g preserves addition.
    have h : g (f (x + y)) = g (f x + f y) := by
      have h₁ : f (x + y) = f x + f y := by
        -- f preserves addition.
        simp [RingHom.map_add]
      rw [h₁]
    -- g preserves addition, so we can distribute g over the sum.
    have h₂ : g (f x + f y) = g (f x) + g (f y) := by
      -- g preserves addition.
      simp [RingHom.map_add]
    -- Combine the two results to get the final equality.
    calc
      g (f (x + y)) = g (f x + f y) := h
      _ = g (f x) + g (f y) := h₂

intro x y
    calc
      g (f (x + y)) = g (f x + f y) := by rw [f.map_add]
      _ = g (f x) + g (f y) := by rw [g.map_add]

intro x y
    have h₁ : g (f (x + y)) = g (f x + f y) := by
      have h₂ : f (x + y) = f x + f y := by
        apply f.map_add
      rw [h₂]
    have h₂ : g (f x + f y) = g (f x) + g (f y) := by
      apply g.map_add
    calc
      g (f (x + y)) = g (f x + f y) := by rw [h₁]
      _ = g (f x) + g (f y) := by rw [h₂]

intro x y
    have h1 : f (x + y) = f x + f y := by
      exact f.map_add x y
    
    have h2 : g (f (x + y)) = g (f x + f y) := by
      rw [h1]
    
    have h3 : g (f x + f y) = g (f x) + g (f y) := by
      exact g.map_add (f x) (f y)
    
    have h4 : g (f (x + y)) = g (f x) + g (f y) := by
      rw [h2, h3]
    
    exact h4

intro x y
    -- Use the property of homomorphism for addition to simplify the expression
    have h₁ : f (x + y) = f x + f y := f.map_add x y
    -- Apply g to both sides of the equation
    have h₂ : g (f (x + y)) = g (f x + f y) := by rw [h₁]
    -- Use the property of homomorphism for addition for g
    have h₃ : g (f x + f y) = g (f x) + g (f y) := g.map_add (f x) (f y)
    -- Combine the results to get the final answer
    rw [h₂, h₃]

  <;>

    have h₂ : g (f x + f y) = g (f x) + g (f y) := by
